mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, pic, detail, price, category_id, store_id, dish_scope, standard_dish_id, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{pic}, #{detail}, #{price}, #{categoryId}, #{storeId}, #{dishScope}, #{standardDishId}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select d.* from dish d where d.category_id = #{categoryId} and d.status = 1 and ( (d.dish_scope = 1 or (d.dish_scope is null and d.store_id is null)) or ((d.dish_scope = 2 or (d.dish_scope is null and d.store_id is not null)) and d.store_id = #{storeId}) )
select * from dish where dish_scope = 1 or (dish_scope is null and store_id is null) order by id desc
select * from dish where store_id = #{storeId} and (dish_scope = 2 or (dish_scope is null and store_id is not null)) order by id desc
